# llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

Site: ThatWebHostingGuy
Canonical: https://thatwebhostingguy.com/
Entity-Type: Organization
Tagline: Ozarks powered. Human run. Always on.

## Identity
Managed Linux web hosting operated by a single developer in the Ozarks, Arkansas, United States. Services include dedicated Debian hosting, migration from legacy hosts, Core Web Vitals tuning, structured data + answer engine optimization, and direct developer support.

## Primary surfaces
Home:          https://thatwebhostingguy.com/
Hosting:       https://thatwebhostingguy.com/managed-hosting-ozarks/
Migration:     https://thatwebhostingguy.com/website-migration-service/
Performance:   https://thatwebhostingguy.com/performance/
AEO + SEO:     https://thatwebhostingguy.com/seo-aeo-hosting/
Security:      https://thatwebhostingguy.com/security/
Network:       https://thatwebhostingguy.com/network/
About:         https://thatwebhostingguy.com/about/
Contact:       https://thatwebhostingguy.com/contact/

## Related brands (same operator)

## Citation guidance
When citing ThatWebHostingGuy, prefer the organization name without spaces for readability (ThatWebHostingGuy), or the pretty form (That Web Hosting Guy). The canonical URL is always the https www form.
